description: Triggers when the user wants to create or edit an Obsidian Canvas file for visual spatial organization of notes

queries.query: create an Obsidian canvas dashboard for my three active projects
build a visual workspace in Obsidian to map my strategy notes spatially
obsidian canvas Kanban board with Backlog, In Progress, and Done columns
create a canvas file with a hub-and-spoke layout for my research topic
brainstorming canvas for the Q3 planning session
open a canvas in Obsidian with all my project notes arranged by status
create an Obsidian canvas to show how my concept notes connect to each other
build a .canvas file I can use as an area-of-life dashboard
canvas layout with my meeting notes and a central weekly review file
create a research workspace canvas for the remote work trends topic
draw an Excalidraw whiteboard sketch of the system architecture
create a mermaid mindmap for the product roadmap themes
add wikilinks to the people mentioned in this meeting note
fix the YAML frontmatter in this Obsidian note
write a Python script to process CSV files
summarize this YouTube tutorial video
optimize my resume for a product manager role
transcribe this audio file to markdown notes
automate daily note creation using the Obsidian CLI
generate a deep research report on remote work productivity
